data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ - Identified 13 test cases; files with .tickets/ refs: review-complexity-classifier.sh, skip-review-check.sh, claude-safe, sprint-next-batch.sh; files that should be deleted but exist: orphaned-tasks.sh, restore-ticket-bodies.sh, qualify-ticket-refs.sh; retro-gather.sh still calls orphaned-tasks.sh
